declarationEmitSetAccessorNoParameter.ts(2,7): error TS1049: A 'set' accessor must have exactly one parameter.
declarationEmitSetAccessorNoParameter.ts(2,7): error TS7032: Property 'foo' implicitly has type 'any', because its set accessor lacks a parameter type annotation.


==== declarationEmitSetAccessorNoParameter.ts (2 errors) ====
    class C {
      set foo() { }
          ~~~
!!! error TS1049: A 'set' accessor must have exactly one parameter.
          ~~~
!!! error TS7032: Property 'foo' implicitly has type 'any', because its set accessor lacks a parameter type annotation.
    }
